title: phyllanthus juglandifolius subsp. cornifolius
intro: Phyllanthus juglandifolius subsp. cornifolius is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae, commonly known as a type of Phyllanthus tree. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus juglandifolius subsp. cornifolius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Phyllanthus juglandifolius subsp. cornifolius can be made into a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used in traditional remedies to promote overall well-being.
